title: Cobble To Stone & Vice Versa
description: Convert Stone and Deepslate into their cobbled variants (and the other way around) through the Stonecutter.
body:
This project will no longer be updated because it has been partially added to vanilla in 26.1. Anything missing in vanilla that is in this pack you'll have to do yourself.


A Data Pack that allows the conversion of Stone and Deepslate into their cobbled variants (and the other way around) through the Stonecutter.

### Note:
This project will no longer be updated as I don't like the idea of converting Cobbled stones into non-cobbled variants through the Stonecutter.
